description: Composition manchester united training blue jacket made of 100% polyester with a 100% mesh lining, has a packable design into self-packing pocket, bungee cord and toggle at hood for a custom Fit, mock-neck that zips up to the chin to block out the elements, and club crest at chest for team pride Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Do not use softeners or bleach Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Do not line dry Do not dry clean Do not iron On or off the pitch, the Manchester United football Club Basic men's rain jacket from nike keeps you dry with water-repellent fabric and an adjustable hood. Play your best and look like your favourite player in this electric blue jersey.
